name: houdini_edges_to_curves
description: Converts edges aligned with the X axis into curves using a Convert Line SOP and a VEX wrangle filter.
python_code:
from src.nodes.base import BaseNode
from src.utils.hou_bridge import get_bridge

class Houdini_Edges_To_CurvesNode(BaseNode):
    name = "houdini_edges_to_curves"

    def __init__(self):
        super().__init__()
        # [AUTO-GENERATED-PORTS-START]
        self.add_input("geo_path", "string", widget_type="text")
        self.add_input("x_threshold", "float", widget_type="float", default=0.9)
        self.add_output("result_path", "string")
        # [AUTO-GENERATED-PORTS-END]

    async def execute(self, inputs):
        geo_path = inputs.get("geo_path", "")
        x_threshold = float(inputs.get("x_threshold", 0.9))

        if not geo_path:
            self.log_error("No geo path provided.")
            return {"result_path": "", "exec_out": True}

        try:
            bridge = get_bridge()

            node_info = bridge.node_info(geo_path)
            category = node_info.get("category", "")

            if category == "Object":
                run_result = bridge.run_code(
                    f"n = hou.node('{geo_path}'); result = n.displayNode().path() if n and n.displayNode() else None"
                )
                input_sop_path = run_result.get("result") if run_result else None
                if not input_sop_path:
                    raise Exception(f"No display SOP found inside: {geo_path}")
                sop_context = geo_path
            elif category == "Sop":
                sop_context = "/".join(geo_path.rstrip("/").split("/")[:-1])
                input_sop_path = geo_path
            else:
                raise Exception(f"Unsupported node category '{category}' at: {geo_path}")

            # Step 1: Convert all polygon edges to line primitives
            convertline_result = bridge.create_node(sop_context, "convertline", "edges_to_lines")
            convertline_path = convertline_result["path"]
            bridge.connect_nodes(input_sop_path, convertline_path, output=0, input_idx=0)

            # Step 2: VEX wrangle - keep only primitives aligned with the X axis
            vex_code = (
                'vector p0 = point(0, "P", primpoint(0, @primnum, 0));\n'
                'vector p1 = point(0, "P", primpoint(0, @primnum, 1));\n'
                'vector dir = normalize(p1 - p0);\n'
                'float alignment = abs(dot(dir, set(1, 0, 0)));\n'
                f'if (alignment < {x_threshold:.4f}) {{\n'
                '    removeprim(0, @primnum, 1);\n'
                '}'
            )

            wrangle_result = bridge.create_node(sop_context, "attribwrangle", "filter_x_edges")
            wrangle_path = wrangle_result["path"]
            bridge.connect_nodes(convertline_path, wrangle_path, output=0, input_idx=0)
            bridge.set_parm(wrangle_path, "class", 1)  # run over primitives
            bridge.set_parm(wrangle_path, "snippet", vex_code)

            bridge.set_display_flag(wrangle_path, True)
            bridge.set_render_flag(wrangle_path, True)
            bridge.layout_children(sop_context)

            return {
                "result_path": wrangle_path,
                "exec_out": True
            }

        except Exception as e:
            self.log_error(f"Houdini edges_to_curves failed: {str(e)}")
            return {"result_path": "", "exec_out": True}

def register_node():
    return Houdini_Edges_To_CurvesNode
